channel.title: Security on Gary Wong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Gary Wong's Blog

item.title: TCP-AO BGP Interop Between IOS-XE and IOS-XR
item.description: Technical lab note documenting a working TCP-AO BGP interop configuration between Catalyst 8000v (IOS-XE 26.1.1) and XR9kv (IOS-XR 7.11.21), including algorithm choice, key-string handling, and include-tcp-options behavior.
